Rebar Concrete Products – RCP TextBot

Legal Documents

Privacy Policy End-User License Agreement

End-User License Agreement

Last updated: April 18, 2026

1. Agreement

This End-User License Agreement ("Agreement") is between Rebar Concrete Products ("Company") and you ("User"). By using RCP TextBot, you agree to these terms.

2. Service Description

RCP TextBot is an SMS-based business tool that allows existing customers of Rebar Concrete Products to place orders, receive payment links, get delivery quotes, and ask construction-related questions via text message. The service also integrates with QuickBooks Online to generate invoices and estimates.

3. Eligibility

RCP TextBot is available to existing customers of Rebar Concrete Products only. Access is verified by phone number against our customer database. Unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.

4. Acceptable Use

Users agree to:

  • Use the service only for legitimate business purposes related to purchasing products from Rebar Concrete Products
  • Provide accurate information when placing orders or submitting plan sets
  • Not attempt to circumvent fraud prevention measures
  • Not use the service to submit false orders or payment information

5. QuickBooks Integration

RCP TextBot uses Intuit QuickBooks Online to manage invoices and estimates. Use of this integration is subject to Intuit's Terms of Service. The Company accesses QuickBooks data solely to process orders on behalf of customers.

6. Orders and Payments

Orders placed through RCP TextBot are subject to product availability and the Company's standard pricing. Delivery fees are calculated at $3.00 per mile from 2112 N Custer Rd, McKinney, TX 75071. Orders of $1,000 or more qualify for free delivery within 30 miles. All orders must be confirmed via estimate approval before fulfillment.

7. Limitation of Liability

The Company is not liable for delays, errors, or damages resulting from system outages, incorrect information provided by the user, or third-party service failures including but not limited to Twilio, OpenAI, or Intuit QuickBooks.

8. Intellectual Property

All content, software, and systems comprising RCP TextBot are the property of Rebar Concrete Products. Users may not copy, reverse-engineer, or distribute any component of the service.

9. Termination

The Company reserves the right to suspend or terminate access for any user who violates these terms or engages in fraudulent activity.

10. Governing Law

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Collin County, Texas.

11. Contact

Rebar Concrete Products
2112 N Custer Rd, McKinney, TX 75071
Phone: 469-631-7730
Email: maddoxconstruction1987@gmail.com
